title: Bringing Cash into China: Declaration Rules
description: How much cash you can bring into China legally. Covers RMB limits, foreign currency declaration thresholds, what happens if you fail to declare, and how to fill out the customs form.

title: China Customs: Prohibited & Restricted Items
description: Complete list of items you cannot bring into China, including restricted goods and duty-free allowances for cigarettes, alcohol, and cash. Based on China Customs 2026 regulations.

title: 入境中国所需文件：清单
description: 2026年入境中国所需文件的完整清单。涵盖免签入境、签证持有者、过境旅客，以及边检人员可能在入境处要求出示的文件。

title: China Health Declaration Form: Online Guide
description: How to complete China's online Health Declaration Form before arrival. Step-by-step guide with screenshots, QR code requirements, and what happens if you forget to submit it.

title: China Transit Visa: 24/72/144-Hour Rules
description: Complete guide to China's transit visa-free policies: 24-hour, 144-hour, and 240-hour options. Which countries qualify, which ports participate, how long you can stay, and where you can go.

title: 如何申请中国签证：完整步骤指南
description: 申请中国签证的分步指南。涵盖签证类型（L、M、F、Z、X）、所需文件、办理时间、费用及常见拒签原因——基于2026年官方程序。

title: 中国免签入境：30+国家规则指南
description: 中国单方面免签政策完整指南。了解您的国家是否符合条件、可停留多久、需要什么文件，以及30天免签入境允许哪些活动。

title: China Customs: Red and Green Channel Explained
description: How China's customs inspection works at the airport. Which items require the Red Channel (Goods to Declare), what happens in the Green Channel, and how baggage X-ray screening operates.

title: Can Foreigners Use E-Gate at China Airports?
description: Whether foreigners can use automated e-gates at Chinese airports for immigration. Requirements, eligibility, which airports have them, and what to do if the e-gate rejects you.

title: China Immigration Process: Step by Step at the Airport
description: What happens when you land in China: immigration check, fingerprint scanning, questions officers may ask, and how to move through the airport efficiently as a foreign traveler.

title: China Temporary Accommodation Registration: Complete Guide
description: How to register your accommodation in China as a foreigner within 24 hours of arrival. Covers hotel automatic registration, private residence registration at police stations, online registration in pilot provinces, and penalties for failing to register.

title: 如何用外国银行卡设置支付宝
description: 将外国Visa、Mastercard或Amex卡绑定到支付宝在中国使用的分步指南。无需中国银行账户。涵盖设置、常见绑定失败问题、TourCard备用方案及2026年交易限额。

title: Is Cash Still Accepted in China?
description: Whether cash is still usable in China in 2026, where mobile payment dominates, where cash is required, and how much cash you should carry as a foreign visitor.

title: Best eSIM for China Travel: Options and Setup
description: Compare the best eSIM options for China travel in 2026. Covers data-only vs. data+voice plans, how to activate, which providers work reliably, and common pitfalls to avoid.

title: 在中国机场购买SIM卡：完整指南
description: 在主要机场购买中国SIM卡的分步指南。有哪些运营商可选、需要什么文件、典型价格以及如何避免游客陷阱。

title: 外国人微信支付：设置指南
description: 如何用外国Visa或Mastercard设置微信支付在中国使用。涵盖钱包地区切换、护照验证、银行卡绑定、常见错误修复和交易限额。

title: How to Book China Train Tickets with a Passport
description: Complete guide to booking high-speed train tickets in China using a foreign passport. Covers 12306 app registration, passport verification (online and at the station), payment, ticket collection, and boarding procedures.

title: Can Foreigners Open a Bank Account in China?
description: Whether short-term foreign visitors can open a Chinese bank account. Covers account types available to non-residents, required documents, which banks accept foreign passport holders, and account limitations.

title: How to Use Didi in China (Without Chinese Language)
description: Step-by-step guide to using Didi ride-hailing in China as a foreigner. Covers the Didi Rider international app, registration with a foreign phone number, payment with foreign cards, and communication with drivers.

title: China Temporary Driving Permit for Foreigners
description: How to apply for a temporary Chinese driving permit using a foreign driver's license. Covers eligibility, required documents, application locations, validity periods, and which countries have mutual recognition agreements with China.

title: 如何在不会中文的情况下在中国点餐
description: 在不会中文的情况下在中国餐厅点餐的实用策略。涵盖扫码点餐二维码、翻译app、图片菜单、指认策略以及英文版外卖app。

title: 外国人中国地铁指南
description: 作为外国人如何在中国城市乘坐地铁。涵盖三种支付方式（支付宝/微信乘车码、城市地铁app、单程票）、车站导航及常见错误。

title: China Tax Refund for Tourists: Step-by-Step Guide
description: How to claim a tax refund on shopping in China as a foreign tourist. Covers eligibility, minimum purchase amounts, refund rates (11% minus 2% handling fee = 9% actual), and the airport refund process.

title: Tipping in China: Complete Guide (You Probably Shouldn't)
description: Do you tip in China? The short answer is no. This guide explains tipping culture across restaurants, hotels, taxis, and tour guides — and the rare exceptions where a tip might be accepted.

title: China Airport Departure: Step-by-Step for Foreigners
description: Complete walkthrough of departing from a Chinese airport as a foreigner: check-in, tax refund, customs declaration, exit immigration, and security. How early to arrive, what documents you need, and what to expect at each checkpoint.

title: What Cannot You Take Out of China?
description: Complete list of items prohibited or restricted from leaving China. Covers antiques, cash limits, wildlife products, sensitive materials, and what customs checks for on departure.

title: China Tax Refund at Airport: Complete Guide
description: How to claim your departure tax refund at the airport step by step. Covers where the customs counter is, what documents you need, how to handle items in checked luggage, and your refund payment options.

title: China Emergency Phone Numbers: Complete Guide
description: All emergency and essential phone numbers in China for foreigners: police, ambulance, fire, traffic accident, and consular protection. Includes how to call without speaking Chinese.

title: Hospitals for Foreigners in Major Chinese Cities
description: Which hospitals in Beijing, Shanghai, Guangzhou, Shenzhen, Chengdu, and other major cities have international departments, English-speaking staff, and accept foreign insurance.

title: Lost Passport in China: Emergency Steps
description: Immediate action plan for foreigners who lose their passport in China. Covers police report, embassy procedures, temporary travel documents, and how to handle visa/entry stamp replacement.

title: China Overstay Penalty: Fines and Consequences
description: What happens if you overstay your visa or visa-free period in China. Detailed breakdown of fines, detention risks, entry bans, and how to handle an overstay situation.

title: Can I Extend My 30-Day Visa-Free Stay?
description: Whether and how to extend a visa-free stay in China beyond 30 days. Covers application process, required documents, approval chances, and what happens if your extension is denied.
